name: Grand Prize Winner Black Bean Tamale Pie (Gre
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with nonstick cooking spray and set aside.
3. In a medium-sized skillet, spray with nonstick cooking spray.
- Sauté onions and green peppers until tender (about 3-5 minutes).
- Add turkey and cook until no longer pink; break the meat into small chunks as you cook.
- Stir in beans, tomato sauce, and taco seasoning mix. Set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, combine cornmeal, sugar, and salt.
5. In a separate small bowl, mix egg, milk, and oil.
6. Add the egg mixture to the cornmeal mixture and combine well.
7. Stir in the drained corn.
8. Press the cornmeal mixture into the prepared pie plate to form a crumb crust.
9. Spoon the bean mixture over the cornmeal "crust".
10. Bake for 20 minutes.
11. Sprinkle grated cheese on top of the pie.
12. Bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
13. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
Weight Watchers equivalents (1/4 pie): 2 1/2 P, 2 B, 1 1/2 F, 70 C.
